changeSet.author: oraskin
changeSet.sql: UPDATE chats chat SET first_user_key_id = public_key.key_id FROM public_keys public_key WHERE chat.chat_type = 'PRIVATE' AND chat.first_user_key_id IS NULL AND public_key.user_id = chat.first_user_id AND public_key.updated_at = ( SELECT MAX(candidate.updated_at) FROM public_keys candidate WHERE candidate.user_id = chat.first_user_id );

UPDATE chats chat SET second_user_key_id = public_key.key_id FROM public_keys public_key WHERE chat.chat_type = 'PRIVATE' AND chat.second_user_key_id IS NULL AND public_key.user_id = chat.second_user_id AND public_key.updated_at = ( SELECT MAX(candidate.updated_at) FROM public_keys candidate WHERE candidate.user_id = chat.second_user_id );

changeSet.author: oraskin
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE chats ADD CONSTRAINT chk_chats_private_key_binding CHECK ( (chat_type = 'PRIVATE' AND first_user_key_id IS NOT NULL AND second_user_key_id IS NOT NULL) OR (chat_type <> 'PRIVATE' AND first_user_key_id IS NULL AND second_user_key_id IS NULL) );
